notes: Captures the rough multi-squid layout and eye placements but the silhouette is broken by photo-trace noise, arms/tentacles are largely missing, and only 3 of the 4-5 squid in the photo appear.
specific_issues: only 3 squid rendered while photo shows 4-5
broken/fragmented mantle outlines instead of clean continuous silhouette
arms and tentacles essentially missing — no clear arm crown or tentacular clubs
interior filled with noisy fragmented short strokes (photo-trace clutter) rather than sparse chromatophore stipple
fins not clearly delineated as a continuous lobe
stray detached line segments floating across body fields
eyes present but heads/funnels not anatomically resolved
